review.author: Jessica M.
review.title: Best business tool of 2026
review.body: I run a consulting firm with 12 employees and Secretary Bird has become our go-to tool for everything data-related. The file organizer alone has saved us countless hours. Highly recommend for any small to mid-size business.

review.author: Robert K.
review.title: Solid but UI needs polish
review.body: Functionality is great. The dark theme is nice but some buttons are hard to find. Took me 10 minutes to figure out where the competitor analysis was hidden. Once you learn the layout though, it's smooth sailing.

review.author: Anonymous
review.title: Not ready for primetime
review.body: Lots of features listed but half of them don't work yet. Salesforce integration? "Coming soon." Google Sheets? "Coming soon." Pipeline builder? Barely functional. Ship it when it's ready, not before.

review.author: Priya S.
review.title: The Excel checker saved my job
review.body: Not exaggerating. I had a report going to the CFO with formula errors in 3 tabs. Secretary Bird caught all of them in seconds. I owe this app my career lol

review.author: GrumpyGus
review.title: wont connect
review.body: something about openclaw not connecting. i dont know what that is and the app doesnt explain it. just says "gateway not available" with no help. uninstalling.

review.author: Carlos D.
review.title: Mixed feelings
review.body: When it works, it's amazing. But the OpenClaw dependency is confusing for non-technical users. Why do I need WSL and Ubuntu just to use a desktop app? Needs a simpler setup process.
